ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spacecrafts" (
  "spacecraft_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_type" INTEGER /* Type of the spacecraft (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the spacecraft is stationed */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date when the spacecraft was manufactured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the spacecraft (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the spacecraft */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spacecrafts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spacecrafts_spacecraft_type FOREIGN KEY ("spacecraft_type") REFERENCES spacecraft_types ("spacecraft_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spacecraft_types" (
  "spacecraft_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spacecraft type */,
  "spacecraft_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the spacecraft type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spacecraft type */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the spacecraft type */,
  "max_charge_level" REAL /* Maximum charge level for the spacecraft type */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Recommended interval for maintenance in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacecraft_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the location (latitude, longitude) */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions at the location (e.g., temperature, atmospheric pressure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "spacecraft_id" TEXT /* ID of the spacecraft the resource belongs to */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the resource */,
  "charge" REAL /* Current charge level of the resource */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of resource */,
  "last_charge_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was last charged */,
  "next_charge_due" TEXT /* Date when the resource needs to be charged next */,
  "critical_threshold" REAL /* Charge level threshold below which an alert should be triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_spacecraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("spacecraft_id") REFERENCES spacecrafts ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_resource_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the resource */,
  "critical_threshold" REAL /* Charge level threshold below which an alert should be triggered for this resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, maintenance) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "spacecraft_id" TEXT /* ID of the spacecraft being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the spacecraft */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the spacecraft was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the spacecraft was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access (e.g., device type, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_spacecraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("spacecraft_id") REFERENCES spacecrafts ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "spacecraft_id" TEXT /* ID of the spacecraft being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in hours */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_spacecraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("spacecraft_id") REFERENCES spacecrafts ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was used */,
  "usage_amount" REAL /* Amount of resource used */,
  "usage_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the resource was used */,
  "usage_location" TEXT /* Location where the resource was used */,
  "usage_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose for which the resource was used (e.g., mission, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)
